title: Setlist Sync
problem: Set changes lived in chat screenshots and were constantly out of date before rehearsal.
shipped: I built a mobile setlist board with quick edits, version history, and one-tap publish.
impact: Setup time dropped from roughly 20 minutes to about 5.

title: Board Brief
problem: Monthly board updates required manual copy-paste from scattered spreadsheets and docs.
shipped: I shipped a summary generator that outputs a clean one-page operations report.
impact: Monthly prep time dropped by around 60%.
